events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: baseplates & anchor bolts, observed field condition is insufficient anchor bolt projection, work in progress. Reference API RP 686 (Recommended Practice for Machinery Installation). Insufficient anchor bolt projection means the bolts don't have enough thread projection above the baseplate/nut — defective. This is a sequence/quality violation. Work should stop, bolts need to be corrected (replace/extend) before grouting/setting equipment. Decision: fail. Risk: high. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 40. Value 0. Confidence high.
